rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(21, 101, 192), rgb(99, 168, 246));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 8px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1565C0;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1565C0, #63a8f6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 105, 92), rgb(97, 187, 176));
